title: lithocarpus brassii
intro: Lithocarpus brassii, also known as the Brassii Lithocarpus, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family (Fagaceae) native to Papua New Guinea. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lithocarpus brassii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Lithocarpus brassii typically involve infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
